description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every pull request and push to the main branch. The workflow should have three jobs: macOS, Windows, and Linux. The macOS job should run on macOS 12 and 13, set up Python 3.12, install packages and modules, and compile the code. The Windows job should run on Windows 2022, set up Python 3.10, install packages and modules, and compile the code. The Linux job should run on Ubuntu 22.04, install dependencies, compile the code, and run tests with coverage.
